data.reasoning: HUMAN ESCALATION REQUIRED — HIGH RISK ACTION. Confidence (80%) is high, but risk level is HIGH (score: 3/3). §6.3: High-risk actions require explicit human approval. Reversibility: MEDIUM — action may not be easily undone. §5.3: The system must never perform irreversible/high-risk actions autonomously. Human operator must explicitly authorize 'thermal_throttle'.
